title: sorghum gangeticum
intro: Sorghum gangeticum, also known as Bhunimba or Indian Sorrel, is a plant species within the family Amaranthaceae, commonly found in India and other parts of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Sorghum gangeticum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as a natural remedy for skin problems and wounds. In traditional Indian medicine, the plant is often used to prepare various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and powders, which are used to treat various health conditions.
